subject: style(theme): standardize muted-text opacity tiers to /50 /60 /70
body:
Audit (per CLAUDE.md hardcoded-color exceptions table) found five
outlier opacity steps on text-base-content: /30 (×2), /40 (×2), /80
(×1). Mapped each to the nearest dominant tier so the muted-text
ladder is one of three steps everywhere:

- PdfPreview.tsx:80   /80 → no opacity
  Module body content; primary readable text shouldn't be muted at
  all. The print:text-black override is unaffected.
- BurgerMenu.tsx:305  /40 → /50
- SequenceSignOff.tsx:94  /40 → /50  (pending-state hourglass icon)
- AppLayout.tsx:254   /30 → /50      (breadcrumb separator)
- NotFoundPage.tsx:9  /30 → /50      (decorative 404 number)

New distribution: /50 ×38, /60 ×34, /70 ×14. Closest existing tier
chosen for each outlier; visual delta is small. No semantic-token
changes; only opacity steps adjusted.

Tags: ui, theme, refactor
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dark-first-default
